title: Audit MAP system usage across lab projects
description: Pause Pathwell and audit the MAP/HPOM system across Downloads/MultiAgentProject, Downloads copies, /home/home/Projects/MultiAgentProject, and other readable /home/home/Projects workspaces, with specific attention to recent emergence/insight use.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory readable MAP and project locations requested by command-center
Assess root MAP task graph, HPOM gates, shared-state health, agent status, and event/task hygiene
Survey non-MAP /home/home/Projects directories for MAP-adjacent or orphaned work
Incorporate claude-lab-rose findings on emergence usage and repo drift with attribution
Record findings, risks, recommendations, and validation in a durable audit artifact
